---
title: "Natsuki Tsushima"
subtitle: "Aerospace Structures and Aeroelasticity"
page-layout: full
---

## Research Vision

I investigate the mechanics, design, and experimental validation of advanced aerospace structures by integrating nonlinear aeroelasticity, structural dynamics, composite materials, mechanical metamaterials, additive manufacturing, and wind-tunnel testing.

> Advancing aerospace structures through nonlinear aeroelasticity, structural dynamics, composite materials, mechanical metamaterials, and wind-tunnel experimentation.

## Research Areas

- Nonlinear aeroelasticity and highly flexible wings
- Flutter mechanism diagnosis and aeroelastic tailoring
- Structural dynamics and vibration control
- Composite and morphing structures
- Aerospace mechanical metamaterials
- Additively manufactured wind-tunnel models

## Selected Publications

Selected publications will be added after verification of the complete bibliographic information.

[View research topics](research.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

[View publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Current Affiliations

- **Kyushu University** — Associate Professor, Department of Aeronautics and Astronautics
- **The University of Tokyo** — Project Associate Professor, Department of Aeronautics and Astronautics
- **Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency (JAXA)** — Visiting Researcher, Aeronautical Technology Directorate

[Full affiliations and contact information](contact.qmd)

## Contact

For research collaboration, invited talks, student supervision, and technical consultation, please include a brief summary of your inquiry.

[Contact information](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

---

This is a personal research website maintained by Natsuki Tsushima. It is not an official website of Kyushu University, The University of Tokyo, or the Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency.
